title: The Disturbances in Khurasan Associated with °Abdallah b. Khazim
description: cAbdalldh b. Khdzim According to cUmar b. Shabbah-cAft b. Muhammad-Maslamah b. Muhirib:325 Salm b. Ziyiid sent cAbdall3h b. Khazim with the tribute he had received from Samarqand and KhwArazm to Yazid b. Mucdwiyah. Salm remained as governor over Khuri sAn until the death of Yazid b. Mu°Awiyah and Mu-dwiyah b. Yazid, whose death he heard about. News came to him too of the killing of Yazid b. Ziyad in Sijistin and the capture of Abu cUbaydah b. Ziyad,326 but he kept the news secret.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 20
